doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_sub1sp2n (mpfr/src/sub1sp.c L775-L1053): same-precision same-sign subtraction fast path for p == 2*GMP_NUMB_BITS (= 128 on x86_64), two-limb mantissas with sh = 0. The dispatcher routes p == 128 here AFTER checking the p < 128 case (so sub1sp2 isn't slowed down by the equality test). Same structural algorithm as sub1sp2: compare magnitudes, exact difference at extended precision, normalise via bitLen, round, underflow check.
c_signature: static int mpfr_sub1sp2n(mpfr_ptr a, mpfr_srcptr b, mpfr_srcptr c, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode)
divergence_from_c: Same as sub1sp2: 2-limb subtraction collapsed to single-bigint; static linkage dropped; Result return shape.
